{{Infobox character
| name = Cladia
| aliases = Cladia Arelius
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[light madra]], blessing}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Sage of a Thousand Eyes]], [[Archlady]]}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Akura clan|Akura family]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Wintersteel (novel)|Wintersteel]]
}}

''See also: [[Cladia Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Cladia Arelius is a [[Sage]] of the [[Arelius family]], known as the [[Sage of a Thousand Eyes]]. She possesses light madra that manifests as numerous glowing spheres resembling a swarm of bees. As a highly experienced [[Sage]], she has reached the limits of her current authority and notes that advancing to the rank of [[Monarch]] is nearly impossible for her without significant change. Her history includes a near-fatal encounter with the [[Weeping Dragon]] approximately ten years ago, an event she survived only through personal preparations and a treasure provided by [[Tiberian Arelius]]. This specific treasure allows her to navigate potential futures by obscuring possibilities and evading the predictions of others. Despite her high standing, she has expressed a desire to assist in combat to protect the [[House Arelius]] banner from [[Monarchs]] targeting [[Eithan]]'s students, though she intends to avoid direct engagement with the [[Weeping Dragon]] herself.}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Cladia]]'s [[Overlord revelation]] was similar to [[Eithan]]'s.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Cladia Arelius, an [[Archlady]] of the [[Akura]] family and the [[Sage of a Thousand Eyes]], appeared at [[Mercy]]'s side wearing dark blue robes. This light madra user, who was observed juggling a [[gatestone]], later donned elegant [[sacred artist]]'s robes while observing the rest of the group. During their activities, she instructed the party to wait for the stabilization of the transfer. Cladia eventually provided a blessing that granted [[Mercy]] the ability to see the [[Weeping Dragon]] with greater clarity.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Cladia]] Arelius is the [[Sage of a Thousand Eyes]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15">''Waybound'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Cladia]] Arelius has blonde hair streaked with gray and wears dark blue robes.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Cladia]] Arelius uses light madra.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Cladia]] Arelius appears at [[Mercy]]'s side.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Cladia]] is an [[Archlady]] and a member of the [[Akura]] family.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c16">''Waybound'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Cladia]] Arelius was seen juggling a [[gatestone]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Cladia]] Arelius is present and observing the others.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18">''Waybound'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Cladia]] told the group to wait until the transfer stabilizes.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Cladia]] wears elegant [[sacred artist]]'s robes.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Cladia]] Arelius provided a blessing that allows [[Mercy]] to see the [[Weeping Dragon]] more clearly.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20">''Waybound'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“We’ll have to wait until the transfer stabilizes,” Cladia told them.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Sacred artists]]
